decks.notes: This mono black aggro deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek. It also utilizes powerful creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Nethergoyf to apply pressure and close out the game quickly. The deck includes efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Kozilek's Command to deal with threats. Additionally, cards like Urza's Saga and Mishra's Bauble provide card advantage and flexibility. Overall, this deck aims to be proactive, aggressive, and disruptive to gain an advantage and win the game efficiently.

This deck focuses on utilizing mana reducing effects such as Ruby Medallion and Ral, Monsoon Mage to generate a large amount of mana quickly. The goal is to cast multiple spells in a single turn, chaining rituals and cantrips like Manamorphose and Reckless Impulse to build up to a huge Grapeshot finisher. The inclusion of cards like Past in Flames and Flashback allows you to recur spells from the graveyard and keep the combo going. The deck is designed to be fast-paced and explosive, aiming to overwhelm the opponent before they can respond effectively.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts and leveraging them to gain incremental advantages and overwhelming the opponent with a strong board presence. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to ramp, and Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke for removal, this deck aims to outpace the opponent and close out the game with powerful threats like Pinnacle Emissary and Arcbound Ravager. Emry, Lurker of the Loch provides recursion and card advantage, while Urza's Saga and Weapons Manufacturing help to further strengthen the artifact theme of the deck.

This deck focuses on using creatures with unique abilities to generate value and create synergies with cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Chord of Calling. By carefully tutoring for specific creatures, the deck can create powerful combinations that can quickly overwhelm the opponent. The creatures in the deck offer a wide range of abilities, from recursion to removal to card draw, allowing the deck to adapt to different situations and outmaneuver the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to assemble a toolbox of creatures that can disrupt the opponent's game plan while advancing its own strategy.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures that can be repeatedly blinked for value and disruption, utilizing cards like Solitude, Ephemerate, and Consign to Memory. Quantum Riddler and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd provide additional threats, while Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer generates card advantage. The deck also includes removal options like Prismatic Ending and No More Lies, as well as counterspells like Spell Snare to control the board. The combination of blink effects and aggressive creatures allows for versatile gameplay and the ability to disrupt the opponent's strategy.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to put pressure on the opponent. It also utilizes burn spells such as Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to control the board and finish off opponents. The deck incorporates cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer for additional value and card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Voice of Victory helps to provide utility and protection for the aggressive creatures. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and efficient aggressive strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly using Eldrazi Temple and Turntimber Symbiosis, while controlling the board with cards like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command. The deck utilizes Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End for a powerful late-game win condition. It also includes support cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Disciple of Freyalise to help generate additional mana or creatures. Overall, the strategy revolves around using Eldrazi creatures and ramp spells to dominate the board and overwhelm the opponent.

The deck aims to efficiently cycle through its cards while controlling the board with creatures and countermagic. The key strategy is to fill up the graveyard with creatures, then resolve Living End to bring them all back into play simultaneously, overwhelming the opponent with a powerful board presence. The deck also includes cards like Shardless Agent and Subtlety to help dig for combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck focuses on setting up a game-winning play through efficient cycling and graveyard manipulation.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells. By playing efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, backed up by removal like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, the deck aims to apply pressure early and close out games before the opponent can stabilize. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provide additional ways to generate advantage and push through for the win. The deck's mana base includes fetch lands and a mix of lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors.

This deck utilizes a variety of small creatures with abilities that can be sacrificed to generate value or disrupt the opponent, while also using tools like Birthing Ritual and Chord of Calling to tutor for crucial combo pieces. The toolbox aspect of the deck allows for flexibility in adapting to different situations and finding specific answers as needed. The key strategy revolves around sacrificing creatures for various effects, generating incremental advantages and ultimately setting up a game-winning combo sequence.

This deck focuses on utilizing The Underworld Cookbook to enable quick aggression and graveyard synergies. By using cards like Persist and Archon of Cruelty, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and disruptive plays. The deck also includes a mix of ramp, removal, and card draw to maintain momentum and pressure the opponent. With a combination of synergy and versatility, this aggro deck aims to dominate the battlefield and secure victory in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and burn spells to quickly overwhelm opponents. The key strategy is to use creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury alongside burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to deal damage efficiently. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Thraben Charm to provide additional support and removal options. The mana base is optimized with fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent color access and efficiency in casting spells.

Utilize graveyard interaction and sacrifice effects to quickly bring out high-powered creatures like Archon of Cruelty, while also utilizing various spells and abilities to control the board and maintain advantage. The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard and then reanimating powerful creatures to overwhelm the opponent before they can react, with supplementary cards like Leyline of Combustion to deter interaction from the opponent. Through a combination of card advantage, efficient removal, and explosive plays, this deck aims to win the game in a decisive and swift manner.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy and card draw, while protecting yourself with cards like Ensnaring Bridge and Torpor Orb. The key cards in this archetype are Lantern of Insight and Codex Shredder, which allow you to manipulate the top card of your opponent's library and prevent them from drawing useful cards. Using cards like Whir of Invention and Narset, Parter of Veils, you can further control the game and outmaneuver your opponent. Overall, this deck focuses on denying your opponent resources and information while setting up your win condition.

The deck focuses on quickly generating mana through spells like Desperate Ritual and Ruby Medallion to cast multiple spells in a single turn, leading up to a win condition such as Grapeshot. Using cards like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Wrenn's Resolve to filter through the deck and find key combo pieces. The goal is to efficiently combo off and deal a large amount of damage to the opponent in a single turn, before they have a chance to respond. The deck aims to be fast and explosive, overwhelming the opponent with a flurry of spells.

This deck aims to combo off using Emry, Lurker of the Loch, Mox Opal, and Mishra's Bauble to generate mana and card advantage. Malevolent Rumble and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provide additional value and disruption to opponents. Urza's Saga helps tutor for key artifact pieces, while Metallic Rebuke offers some interaction. The deck also includes a variety of utility lands and artifacts to help control the board and enable the combo win condition. Overall, the deck focuses on assembling its combo pieces quickly while disrupting opponents' game plans.
